sections.paragraph:
Original: כּל־חזה

Transliteration: kol-chôzeh

Phonetic: kol-kho-zeh'

BDB Definition:

Col-hozeh = "all-seeing"
  1. father of a repairer of Jerusalem's walls during the time of Nehemiah

Origin: from H3605 and H2374

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
